'''Rylothan yurp''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] drink named for the [[planet]] [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. [[Raf Othrem]] drank it in a [[tapcafe]].<ref name="NJO: The Final Prophecy">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''</ref>
